steps.title: Set the product equal to zero
steps.content:
The $x$-intercepts happen when $y=0$. Since $4$ is not zero, set the product of the factors equal to zero:
$$(x-12)(x+6)(x+5)=0$$

steps.title: Use any zero of the product
steps.content:
Set each factor equal to $0$:
$$x=12,\quad x=-6,\quad x=-5$$
The question asks for an $x$-coordinate of an $x$-intercept, so one valid value is $12$. The answer is 12.
